prompt: review the design of my app at http://localhost:3000
expected_output: Skill triggers, runs audit.py, produces ux-audit/report.json and ux-audit/design-critique.md with specific findings
expectations: each finding references a screenshot path or CSS value
fixes applied for Critical and Moderate issues (unless report-only requested)

prompt: make my UI more beautiful and consistent
expected_output: Skill triggers, discovers running dev server, runs full audit, applies design improvements
expectations: dev server auto-detected if not provided
specific CSS fixes applied to target inconsistencies

prompt: audit the UX of the dashboard page at http://localhost:5173/dashboard
expected_output: Skill audits only the /dashboard route, produces targeted critique
expectations: design critique focused on the dashboard page

prompt: report only — give me a design critique of http://localhost:3000 but don't change anything
expected_output: Audit runs and report is produced, but no file edits are made to the project
expectations: no CSS or component files modified
report clearly distinguishes what would be fixed if fixes were enabled

prompt: how do I center a div?
expectations: skill does not trigger on a casual CSS question

prompt: find all the bugs in my app
expected_output: User directed to frontend-twerkin, skill NOT invoked
expectations: frontend-ux-designer skill does not trigger on bug-finding requests
user informed that frontend-twerkin is the right skill for bugs
